name: Cheddar Broccoli Chicken Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken breasts on both sides in a small amount of oil; drain off excess oil.
2. Combine cream of broccoli soup and milk; pour over chicken.
3. Bring to a boil; cover and cook over low heat 5 to 10 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
4. Remove chicken from pan; keep warm.
5. Add 1 cup shredded Cheddar cheese to the sauce; stir until melted.
6. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
7. Sprinkle additional cheese over all.
8. Serve with hot cooked pasta or rice. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
NOTE: Lite Cheddar may be substituted but increase milk to 2/3 cup.
